name: rikyu
description: Interact with the RIKEN Rikyu supercomputer: submit and monitor Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the official Rikyu documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor Rikyu Slurm jobs and search Rikyu docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the RIKEN Rikyu supercomputer from Codex: submit and monitor GPU-first Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in Rikyu documentation index.
defaultPrompt: Submit a small Rikyu GPU test job.
